title: Scarlet Dagger
description: The mod for the new weapon is the Scarlet Dagger, which adds 2 new materials and a blade.
body:
The mod for the new weapon is the **Scarlet Dagger**.
## Blood-red blades from the YouTube channel MrLololoshka, belonging to the character Mrk'grsh'traklar.

The mod adds a new gemstone - Scarlet Metal, as well as a hardened bloody netherite ingot with which you can create a dagger. 

![Scarlet metal recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4b0dbaac6633ced3b3c6b45c17c65a0a1e7d791.png)
![Bloody netherite ingot recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac965512baa15b5c6ee29be318a94bb3ec02bdb7.png)

Every second of the bloody netherite ingot in your inventory will put a weakness on you, sucking the life out of the player.

The dagger has magical properties. He is able to set fire to a target on impact but if the player takes damage, the dagger puts a weakness on him.

![Scarlet Dagger recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e595e2a0342770da7b050d5734414de9a14ca1b.png)
